title: Create: TrainSounds
description: TrainSounds enhances the Create mod with dynamic engine sounds for various train types.
body:
# 🚂 TrainSounds

**TrainSounds** is an immersion-focused addon for the **Create Mod** that brings your rail network to life. No more silent electric locomotives or generic steam huffs—TrainSounds introduces dynamic, speed-reactive engine audio and advanced fleet management tools.

### 🔊 Dynamic Audio Experience
*   **Speed-Sensitive Pitch:** Engines roar as they accelerate and hum quietly at idle, with pitch and volume perfectly synced to your train's actual velocity.
*   **Multiple Engine Types:** Custom sound profiles specifically designed for **Diesel** and **Electric** icons.
*   **Intelligent Logic:** Electric sounds only trigger when a live connection is detected (via **PAW**), adding a layer of realism to your electrified lines.

### 🛠️ Advanced Carriage Management
Control your train like never before with the dedicated **Management Interface**.
*   **Per-Carriage Toggling:** Enable or disable engines on specific carriages to customize your train's power profile and soundscape.
*   **Interactive 3D Preview:** (*Exclusive to Create 6.0+*) View your train in a beautiful blueprint-style menu. Use your **Right Click** to rotate the model and the **Scroll Wheel** to zoom in on specific details.

---

### 📅 Version Highlights

#### **Create 6.0.x (Modern)**
This is the definitive version of the mod. It includes the **new Interactive 3D GUI**, allowing you to visually inspect your carriages while managing engine states. It leverages the latest rendering techniques for a smooth, modern feel.

#### **Create 0.5.x (Legacy)**
For those still on older versions of Create, this version provides the core sound engine and basic carriage toggling logic. Note: The interactive 3D blueprint menu is not available in this version.

---

### 📦 Dependencies

#### **For Create 6.0.x (Modern)**
| Dependency | Required | Min Version | Purpose |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| [**Create Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) | **YES** | `6.0.8.0` | Core rail and contraption system. |
| [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | **YES** | `any` | Essential library for the Fabric loader. |
| [**PAW (Pantographs and Wires)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-pantographs-and-wires) | **YES** | `alpha-0.2.0-1-C6` | Required for advanced Electric Sound logic. |
| [**Steam 'n' Rails**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails) | **YES** | `any` | **Required.** Needed for icon selection and the 3D Preview. |

#### **For Create 0.5.x (Legacy)**
| Dependency | Required | Min Version | Purpose |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| [**Create Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) | **YES** | `0.5.1` | Core rail and contraption system. |
| [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | **YES** | `any` | Essential library for the Fabric loader. |
| [**PAW (Pantographs and Wires)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-pantographs-and-wires) | **YES** | `beta-0.1.1` | Required for advanced Electric Sound logic. |
| [**Steam 'n' Rails**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails) | **YES** | `any` | **Required.** Needed for icon selection in the Train Station. |
